title: Job Opening Teacher at Narayana Group

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at Narayana Group
jsonLd.description:
Join the Narayana Group family as a Teacher in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Narayana Group:
Narayana Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Group!
